text.title: API Error Handling Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the api-error-handling artefact. Validator enforces the listed required fields + cross-field checks.

example.note: catalogue_id pattern fails; envelope_shape not rfc-7807; type not a URI; status 500 with class=client violates 4xx/5xx split; traceid_field not in enum.

list.item: errors[].status in 4xx range with class=server (or vice versa).
